title: centaurea × costeana
intro: Centaurea × costeana, also known as cornflower, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × costeana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
